customrecordtype.description: Marketplace-specific settings for the Amazon Connector. Each row defines customer, location, subsidiary, payment method, and tax settings for a specific marketplace.

customrecordcustomfield.label: Marketplace ID
customrecordcustomfield.description: Amazon Marketplace ID (e.g., ATVPDKIKX0DER for US, A1F83G8C2ARO7P for UK)

customrecordcustomfield.label: Marketplace Name
customrecordcustomfield.description: Friendly name for the marketplace (e.g., US, UK, DE, CA)

customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Customer
customrecordcustomfield.description: Default customer record for orders from this marketplace

customrecordcustomfield.label: FBA Customer
customrecordcustomfield.description: Customer record for FBA orders from this marketplace

customrecordcustomfield.label: B2B Customer
customrecordcustomfield.description: Customer record for Amazon B2B orders from this marketplace

customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Warehouse Location
customrecordcustomfield.description: Default warehouse location for orders from this marketplace

customrecordcustomfield.label: FBA Warehouse Location
customrecordcustomfield.description: FBA warehouse location for this marketplace

customrecordcustomfield.label: Payment Method
customrecordcustomfield.description: Payment method internal ID for orders from this marketplace

customrecordcustomfield.label: Tax Item
customrecordcustomfield.description: Tax item for orders from this marketplace

customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Tax Code
customrecordcustomfield.description: Default tax code for orders from this marketplace
